# GitHub CODEOWNERS
#
# This is a native GitHub feature that automatically requests reviews from
# specific users or teams when a Pull Request is opened.
#
# In this repository, we use a global catch-all to ensure the maintainers
# team is notified of all changes. This works in conjunction with
# .github/component_owners.yml which handles more granular per-service logic.

* @open-telemetry/demo-approvers
